description: Black and grey backpackOne haul loop on the top, two padded and adjustable shoulder straps with mesh detailingTwo main zip compartments, has a laptop sleeve with a Velcro closure in one and the other has a slip pocket, a mesh pocket and pen holdersOne external zip pocket at the frontA mesh stash pocket on either the sidePadded back with mesh detailPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
